---
name: Plugin Proposal
about: Propose a new language, framework, or visualizer plugin
title: '[PLUGIN] '
labels: plugin-proposal
assignees: ''
---

## Plugin Type
- [ ] Language plugin (e.g. Kotlin, Python, Go)
- [ ] Framework plugin (e.g. Quarkus, NestJS, Django)
- [ ] Visualizer plugin (e.g. C4, sequence diagram, dependency wheel)
- [ ] Integration plugin (e.g. Confluence, Jira, GitLab)

## Plugin Name
Suggested name (e.g. `lang-kotlin`, `framework-quarkus`, `viz-c4`).

## Use Case
What does this plugin enable users to see / do?

## Inputs
Which files / data sources does the plugin consume?

## Outputs
What does it produce (entities, relations, visualisation)?

## Dependencies
External libraries or services required.

## Maintainership
Are you willing to maintain this plugin?
